about.metaDescription: BEATRIP is a flight-deal portal that automatically collects airline sale information and provides flash deals, sale-timing forecasts, and price-history data.
about.title: About BEATRIP
about.intro: BEATRIP is a flight-deal portal built around one idea: never miss the lowest fare. We automatically collect and analyze airline sale information.

features.title: Automatic sale tracking
features.description: We automatically collect sale information from major airlines such as ANA, JAL, Peach, and Jetstar — no more manual checking.

features.title: Sale-timing forecasts
features.description: AI analyzes historical sale data to predict the timing and probability of the next sale, so you can book at the best moment.

features.title: Price alerts
features.description: Get notified instantly when a route you care about drops below your target price. Never miss the chance.

features.title: Reliable data
features.description: All information is sourced directly from airline official websites, delivering accurate and up-to-date sale information.

mission: Airline sale information is scattered across individual airline sites and social media, and it's easy to miss. BEATRIP aggregates it in one place and combines it with data-driven sale forecasts so users can book flights at the cheapest possible time.
We do not sell tickets directly — we are an information-only service. Always confirm details on each airline's official website before booking.
about.dataSourcesIntro: Sale information is collected from the following airline official websites:

faq.metaDescription: Answers to common questions about using BEATRIP, reading sale information, and setting up price alerts.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions

items.a: BEATRIP is a flight-deal information site that automatically collects airline sale information and provides flash deals, sale-timing forecasts, and price-history data. We do not sell tickets directly and are for informational purposes only.

items.q: Where does the sale information come from?
items.a: We automatically collect sale information from the official websites of major airlines such as ANA, JAL, Peach, Jetstar Japan, and Scoot. Information is updated regularly, but please confirm the latest prices and seat availability on the airline's official site.

Listed prices are accurate as of the time of collection. Airfares constantly fluctuate based on seat availability and exchange rates, so actual prices may differ. Always confirm the latest price on the airline's official site before booking.

AI analyzes historical sale records (dates, frequency, discount rates, etc.) to predict the timing and probability of the next sale. Forecasts are reference information only and do not guarantee that a sale will actually occur.

items.q: How do I set up a price alert?
items.a: In the 'Price Alert' section on each deal's detail page, you can set the price at which you'd like to be notified. We'll let you know when it drops to or below that amount. Currently only browser notifications are supported.

items.q: How do I use the favorites feature?
items.a: Click the heart icon on any deal card to add it to your favorites. Favorites are saved in your browser's local storage, so they'll appear again when you visit from the same browser.

items.q: Can I book flights on BEATRIP?
items.a: You cannot book flights directly on BEATRIP. Clicking the 'Book' button takes you to the airline's official site or a partner booking site. Complete your booking on the destination site.

items.q: Can I use it on a smartphone?
items.a: Yes. BEATRIP supports PWA (Progressive Web App), so you can add it to your smartphone's home screen and use it like an app. Select 'Add to Home Screen' from your browser menu.
Yes. Click the sun/moon icon at the top right of the header to switch between light and dark mode. The setting is saved in your browser.

terms.metaDescription: BEATRIP's Terms of Service. Please read them before using the service.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.updated: Terms of Service — Last updated: May 15, 2026

sections.title: Article 1 (Application)
sections.content: These Terms set out the conditions for using BEATRIP (the "Service"). Users shall use the Service in agreement with these Terms.

sections.title: Article 2 (Service Content)
sections.content: The Service automatically collects airline sale information and provides flash deals, sale-timing forecasts, price-history data, and similar information. The Service does not sell tickets or act as a booking agent; it is for informational purposes only.

sections.title: Article 3 (Accuracy of Information)
sections.content: Information on the Service is collected from airline official websites and similar sources, but its accuracy, completeness, and timeliness are not guaranteed. Airfares and seat availability constantly change, so always confirm the latest information on the airline's official site before booking.

sections.title: Article 4 (Disclaimer)
sections.content: We bear no responsibility for any flight bookings or purchases made by users based on information on the Service. Sale-forecast results are reference information only and do not guarantee that a sale will actually occur.

sections.title: Article 5 (Prohibited Acts)
sections.content:
Users must not do any of the following when using the Service:
- Reproduce or republish the Service's content without permission
- Automated access such as scraping or crawling the Service
- Interfere with the operation of the Service
- Any other act we deem inappropriate

sections.title: Article 6 (Intellectual Property)
sections.content: Intellectual property rights related to the Service belong to us or the rightful owners. Users may not reproduce, republish, or modify the Service's content without our prior written consent.

sections.title: Article 7 (Changes / Suspension)
sections.content: We may change the content of the Service, or suspend or terminate its provision, without prior notice to users.

sections.title: Article 8 (Changes to Terms)
sections.content: We may change these Terms as necessary. The revised Terms take effect from the time they are posted on the Service.

privacy.metaDescription: BEATRIP's Privacy Policy, explaining how personal information is handled.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content:
The Service may collect the following information:
- Access environment information such as browser type and OS
- Access logs such as access date/time and pages viewed
- Information entered by users when setting price alerts
- User settings such as theme and favorites stored via cookies

sections.title: 2. Purpose of Use
sections.content:
Collected information is used for the following purposes:
- Providing, operating, and improving the Service
- Improving user experience (retaining theme settings, favorites, etc.)
- Providing the price-alert feature
- Service improvement through access analysis
- Preventing unauthorized access

sections.title: 3. Information Storage
sections.content: User settings such as favorites, price alerts, and theme are stored in your browser's local storage. This information is stored only on the user's device and is not sent to our servers.

sections.title: 4. Provision to Third Parties
sections.content: We do not provide collected information to third parties without the user's consent, except as required by law.

sections.title: 5. Access Analysis Tools
sections.content: The Service may use services such as Google Analytics for access analysis. These services use cookies to collect access information but do not include personally identifiable information. See each service's privacy policy for details.

sections.title: 6. Affiliate Links
sections.content: The Service may contain affiliate links to airline official sites or partner booking sites. If a user makes a booking via these links, we may receive a referral commission.

sections.title: 7. Use of Cookies
sections.content: The Service uses cookies to improve user experience. You can restrict cookie use via your browser settings, but some features may not work properly.

sections.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may change this Privacy Policy as necessary. The revised policy takes effect from the time it is posted on the Service.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.content: For inquiries about this policy, please contact us via the contact form on the site.

disclosure.metaDescription: BEATRIP uses affiliate advertising (TravelPayouts marker=729387 and others). This page lists our partner programs, how the affiliate model works, and our editorial independence.
disclosure.title: Advertising Disclosure

sections.title: 1. About affiliate advertising
sections.content: BEATRIP (the "Service") participates in performance-based affiliate programs. Outbound links on this Service (flight, hotel, eSIM, airport transfer, travel insurance booking buttons, etc. opened in a new tab) may be advertising. If you make a booking through one of these links, the Service may receive a referral commission from the advertiser. Per Japanese advertising regulations, such links carry rel="sponsored".

sections.title: 2. Affiliate programs we use
sections.content:
The Service currently uses the following partner programs (subject to change based on approval status):

● TravelPayouts (marker ID: 729387) — flight, hotel and travel-companion affiliate network
● Hotellook — cross-OTA hotel price comparison
● Booking.com — hotel bookings
● Trip.com — flights and hotels
● Agoda — hotels (strong in Asia)
● Aviasales / Skyscanner — flight metasearch
● Airalo — travel eSIM
● KiwiTaxi — airport transfers
● Travel insurance (TBD after approval)

Referral commissions are paid by the advertiser and never marked up to the user's price.

sections.title: 3. About displayed prices and availability
sections.content: The Service does not sell flights directly; it aggregates publicly available information from airlines and OTAs. Listed prices and seat availability reflect the moment of fetch. Always confirm the latest on the destination site before booking.

sections.title: 4. Editorial independence
sections.content: Sale listings, articles, and curated hotel picks are chosen for their value to users, independent of the size of any affiliate commission. "Best time to book" and seasonal forecasts are statistical guidance based on historical data, not a guarantee of any particular advertiser's sale.

sections.title: 5. Cookies and analytics
sections.content: Clicks on affiliate links are measured via Google Analytics 4 events (partner_click / hotel_click / affiliate_click). This data is used to measure conversion and improve the Service, and does not include personally identifiable information. See the Privacy Policy for details.

sections.title: 6. Changes
sections.content: This disclosure will be updated as partner programs are added or ended. The "last updated" date above reflects the most recent revision.
